title: Say it correctly
instruction: Choose the correct way to say or write each number.

questions.question: How do you say the number 1,450?
options: One thousand four hundred and fifty
questions.answer: One thousand four hundred and fifty

questions.question: A car costs £12,750. How do you say this?
options: Twelve thousand seven hundred and fifty pounds
One hundred and twenty seven pounds fifty
questions.answer: Twelve thousand seven hundred and fifty pounds

questions.question: Which number is an ordinal number?
The car has 34,200 miles on it. How do you say this?
options: Thirty four thousand and two hundred
